'''vadhate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:zetetically|zetetically]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-dh-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:zetetically|zetetically]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| vadhate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:vadhate|vadhate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:vadhatesher|vadhatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:vadhatesherĂ«m|vadhatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:vadhatero|vadhatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:vadhateshĂ«|vadhateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:vadhateshĂ«m|vadhateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokivadhatero|gokivadhatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokivadhateshĂ«|gokivadhateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokivadhateshĂ«m|gokivadhateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:govadhankerom|govadhankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:govadhankeshĂ«|govadhankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:govadhankeshĂ«m|govadhankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:govadhankeya|govadhankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:vadhaterom|vadhaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:vadhatemu|vadhatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:vadhateya|vadhateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokivadhaterom|gokivadhaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokivadhatemu|gokivadhatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokivadhateya|gokivadhateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:vadhadhate|vadhadhate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:vadhadhatesher|vadhadhatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:vadhadhatesherĂ«m|vadhadhatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:vadhadhatero|vadhadhatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:vadhadhateshĂ«|vadhadhateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:vadhadhateshĂ«m|vadhadhateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokivadhadhatero|gokivadhadhatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokivadhadhateshĂ«|gokivadhadhateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokivadhadhateshĂ«m|gokivadhadhateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:govadhadhankerom|govadhadhankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:govadhadhankeshĂ«|govadhadhankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:govadhadhankeshĂ«m|govadhadhankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:govadhadhankeya|govadhadhankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:vadhadhaterom|vadhadhaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:vadhadhatemu|vadhadhatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:vadhadhateya|vadhadhateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokivadhadhaterom|gokivadhadhaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokivadhadhatemu|gokivadhadhatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokivadhadhateya|gokivadhadhateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:vĂŠdhĂŠte|vĂŠdhĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:vĂŠdhĂŠtesher|vĂŠdhĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:vĂŠdhĂŠtesherĂ«m|vĂŠdhĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:vĂŠdhĂŠtero|vĂŠdhĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:vĂŠdhĂŠteshĂ«|vĂŠdhĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:vĂŠdhĂŠteshĂ«m|vĂŠdhĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokivĂŠdhĂŠtero|gokivĂŠdhĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokivĂŠdhĂŠteshĂ«|gokivĂŠdhĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokivĂŠdhĂŠteshĂ«m|gokivĂŠdhĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:govĂŠdhĂŠnkerom|govĂŠdhĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:govĂŠdhĂŠnkeshĂ«|govĂŠdhĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:govĂŠdhĂŠnkeshĂ«m|govĂŠdhĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:govĂŠdhĂŠnkeya|govĂŠdhĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:vĂŠdhĂŠterom|vĂŠdhĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:vĂŠdhĂŠtemu|vĂŠdhĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:vĂŠdhĂŠteya|vĂŠdhĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokivĂŠdhĂŠterom|gokivĂŠdhĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokivĂŠdhĂŠtemu|gokivĂŠdhĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokivĂŠdhĂŠteya|gokivĂŠdhĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:vafdhafte|vafdhafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:vafdhaftesher|vafdhaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:vafdhaftesherĂ«m|vafdhaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:vafdhaftero|vafdhaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:vafdhafteshĂ«|vafdhafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:vafdhafteshĂ«m|vafdhafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokivafdhaftero|gokivafdhaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokivafdhafteshĂ«|gokivafdhafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokivafdhafteshĂ«m|gokivafdhafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:govafdhafnkerom|govafdhafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:govafdhafnkeshĂ«|govafdhafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:govafdhafnkeshĂ«m|govafdhafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:govafdhafnkeya|govafdhafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:vafdhafterom|vafdhafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:vafdhaftemu|vafdhaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:vafdhafteya|vafdhafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokivafdhafterom|gokivafdhafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokivafdhaftemu|gokivafdhaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokivafdhafteya|gokivafdhafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
